title: Opt-in statusline vendor stage in onboarding (copy_statusline)
read_first: skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs (plan stage 3+5, lines ~1093-1131; apply switch ~1293; buildManagedVersions ~1168)
docs/history/learnings/critical-patterns.md ([20260711] skill-sync entry — mirror logic review discipline)
action: Per decision 102efe08: (1) create skills/bee-hive/templates/statusline/ holding byte-copies of beegog/.claude/statusline-command.sh and statusline-usage.mjs; (2) in onboard_bee.mjs add a conditional plan stage mirroring the repo_hooks shape: when <repo>/.claude/settings.json parses AND typeof statusLine.command === 'string' AND it contains '.claude/statusline-command.sh', byte-compare each template against <repo>/.claude/<name> and push { action: 'copy_statusline', path: '.claude/<name>' } when missing or drifted; any parse failure or unexpected shape means NOT opted in (fail-safe, never throw); (3) apply case writes via writeFileAtomic; (4) buildManagedVersions gains a conditional managed.statusline hash set ONLY for opted-in repos (mirror repo_hooks conditional) and subsetManaged treats it likewise so non-opted hosts see a byte-identical manifest; (5) extend test_lib.mjs vendor byte-equality sweep: templates/statusline/* must be byte-identical to the repo's .claude/ siblings; (6) sandbox tests in test_onboard_bee.mjs covering the plan.md test matrix (opted-in missing/drifted, non-opted variants, unparseable settings, idempotent second apply).

truths: A host without the statusLine opt-in entry gets zero copy_statusline items, no managed.statusline key, and its up_to_date status is unchanged by this feature
An opted-in host with a missing or drifted statusline file gets exactly the drifted subset as copy_statusline items, and --apply then recheck reports up_to_date
Onboarding never creates or mutates a host's .claude/settings.json in this stage
An unparseable settings.json or non-string statusLine.command is treated as not opted in without throwing
artifacts: new sandbox test cases in test_onboard_bee.mjs
key_links: copy_statusline apply case wired in the same switch as copy_helper/copy_repo_hook
managed.statusline participates in the onboarding.json drift comparison for opted-in repos
prohibitions: No unconditional vendor to non-opted hosts
No weakening of existing onboard tests or assertions (frozen judge)

trace.outcome: Opt-in statusline vendor stage shipped: copy_statusline plan/apply action, conditional managed.statusline manifest, fail-safe opt-in detection, byte-equality sweep, 20 new sandbox assertions
